## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Prolific.com and GrowthX to explore potential content marketing partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prolific seeks to augment content marketing capabilities, focusing on AI model creators (Tier 1: Frontier, Tier 2: Proprietary)](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation with human oversight, emphasizing quality at scale](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Pricing: $30K for 8-week strategy sprint, $15K/month for 12-month execution (20-25 pieces/month)](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Next steps: Brad to review materials internally, potential follow-up call next week](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)

## Topics

### Prolific's Background and Target Audience

  - [10+ year history in academic research participant recruitment](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Expanded into AI research; works with 85% of top foundation model creators](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Current focus: Tier 1 (Frontier Model) and Tier 2 (Proprietary Model) creators](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Seeking to significantly expand revenue in these segments](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### GrowthX's Offerings and Process

  - [End-to-end agency leveraging AI workflows with expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Services: SEO strategy, content creation, publishing, LLM visibility monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint: Develops personalized artifacts, brand voice, audience insights](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [12-month execution phase: Daily publishing, ongoing optimization](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Fact-checking and quality control built into AI-driven workflow](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

### Content Creation Workflow

  - [Multi-step process: Brief creation, research, outlining, drafting, editing, fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [AI-powered with human oversight at each stage](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Continuous improvement of workflows and output quality](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Option for custom steps (e.g., synthetic expert review based on client input)](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)

### Pricing and Engagement Structure

  - [Strategy Sprint: $30K fixed fee (8 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [Execution Phase: $15K/month for 12 months (daily publishing, \~20-25 pieces/month)](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [Additional services (e.g., microsites, newsletters): $9K-$15K/month](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [One-off projects available at separate pricing](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)

### Client Examples and Results

  - [Augment: 10X increase in monthly organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Tiro: 10X traffic increase in 6 months (niche industry, started with no presence)](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [Ramp: Created \~1000 content pieces over 1+ year partnership](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send presentation, call recording, and SOW to Brad](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [Brad to discuss internally with marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
  - [Aim for follow-up call with wider Prolific team late next week](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=1914.0)
  - [Brad to make decision within a week after follow-up call](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=2087.0)
  - [GrowthX to confirm any potential conflicts with Surge (competitor) engagement](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
  - [If moving forward, aim to reserve kickoff date (currently \~4 weeks out)](https://fathom.video/share/_gj24Sey96S2sNN-ZUJrcPqjmHfiX-zb?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
